evals.prompt: Run /sync-upstream in this fork. It has origin plus a GitHub parent repo, local main is behind upstream/main, and there are two feature branches plus dev. Keep all branches synced and tell me what happened.
evals.expected_output: The assistant follows the full workflow: detects or configures upstream, fast-forwards main, rebases every non-main/non-dev local branch, pushes rebased branches with --force-with-lease, rebuilds dev from main by merging feature branches, restores any stash, and reports a branch summary plus dev graph.
expectations: Checks working tree status before modifying branches.
Fetches upstream main and updates local main only with a fast-forward merge.
Excludes main and dev when selecting feature branches to rebase.
Uses --force-with-lease for rewritten feature branches and dev.
Reports per-branch results and shows the dev graph.

evals.prompt: sync upstream for this fork, but main has local-only commits and upstream/main also has new commits. Do not lose my local main work.
evals.expected_output: The assistant stops when main cannot fast-forward, does not force merge or reset, shows both sides of the divergence, and asks the user how to proceed.
expectations: Attempts or verifies fast-forward-only update of main.
Does not run git reset, non-fast-forward merge, or force push main.
Shows commits in main..upstream/main and upstream/main..main.
Stops before rebasing feature branches or rebuilding dev.

evals.prompt: Bring my fork up to date. One feature branch conflicts during rebase; there is a PATCH.md and docs/branch-auth-refresh.md with conflict guidance. Preserve the branch intent if you can, but skip it if it cannot be resolved safely.
evals.expected_output: The assistant reads the intent documents before resolving conflicts, applies branch-specific guidance where possible, continues the rebase and pushes with --force-with-lease, or aborts and reports the skipped branch with clear manual next steps.
expectations: Reads PATCH.md or docs/PATCH.md before conflict resolution when present.
Reads docs/branch-auth-refresh.md before resolving that branch.
Preserves upstream and branch intent when resolving conflicts.
Uses git rebase --abort and reports the branch if the conflict is not safely resolvable.
Does not add AI Co-Authored-By trailers.
